regimeNotes: NEUTRAL regime maintained 2026-06-19. Equities near all-time highs (SPX 7486.7; SPY $746.74, slight pullback from $750.33 yesterday). NVDA recovered to $210.69 (+2.96% vs yesterday, now above $208.44 avg cost). BTC fell further to $62,504 (-2.38% vs $64,026 yesterday); crypto in persistent Extreme Fear (F&G 14, same as yesterday). BTC dominance 55.98%, total crypto mcap $2.24T (-2.54% 24h). 10Y Treasury 4.44% (elevated, restrictive). DXY ~99 (soft USD, mildly supportive); EUR/USD ~1.165. Fed: 97% probability of hold at next meeting but rate hike signaled as tail risk for late 2026; no cuts priced near-term. HOLD day — 0 trades. Crypto sleeve at 19.55% NAV (under 20% neutral cap); no room to add crypto without breaching sleeve cap. All stock positions near 15% entry cap; equities at ATH = stretched valuations, not a fear-driven entry. Cash 13.31% NAV maintained as dry powder for risk-on flip. All 9 positions above invalidation levels; no guardrail breaches. Next catalysts: PCE data June 25, next FOMC Q3 2026.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta ($746.74, 13.2% NAV). S&P near all-time highs (SPX 7,486) with AI/semiconductor rally sustaining broad index. Diversified anchor under the growth-tilted mandate; participates in any continued risk-on leg.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed Fed re-pricing toward multiple hikes pushing SPY into a technical downtrend.

NVDA.thesis: AI/compute secular leader at $210.69 (+1.08% above $208.44 avgCost, ~14.7% NAV). Now above average cost after recovery; data-center revenue and hyperscaler capex still accelerating. Highest-conviction growth driver for the 33% CAGR target.
NVDA.invalidationLevel: AI capex digestion or data-center demand rollover; close below ~150 USD.

MSFT.thesis: Quality AI/cloud compounder at $379.40 (-3.21% below $391.98 avgCost, ~14.5% NAV). Broad market pullback affecting quality names; cloud+AI thesis intact and FCF remains durable. Watching for recovery toward 390+.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex without demonstrable ROI; close below 340 USD.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality growth (search + cloud + AI) at $368.03 (+0.41% above $366.53 avgCost, ~14.5% NAV). Near-monopoly search funds AI optionality; resilient earnings in hawkish-rate tape.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals; close below 310 USD.

UNH.thesis: Defensive value at $400.96 (-1.85% below $408.52 avgCost, ~5.9% NAV). Medical-cost and regulatory headwinds persist; retained as defensive ballast. Analyst targets 450-466 USD give upside.
UNH.invalidationLevel: Further regulatory or medical-cost shock; close below 360 USD.

GLD.thesis: Tail/debasement hedge at $387.12 (above $386.54 avgCost, ~4.3% NAV). EUR/USD 1.165 (soft USD) and central-bank buying supportive; small size prevents drag on 33% CAGR target.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with a strong USD reversal; close below 350 USD.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto sleeve leader at $62,504 (-3.29% below $64,629 avgCost, ~14.1% NAV). F&G 14 (Extreme Fear, persistent) + BTC dominance 55.98% = contrarian accumulation setup. Held at 20% neutral-regime cap; positioned for the next risk-on expansion to 35% sleeve cap.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader at $1,687.93 (+1.22% above $1,667.47 avgCost, ~4.1% NAV). Historically low dominance (9.10%) = asymmetric upside when risk-on returns. Held within the 20% crypto sleeve.
ETH.invalidationLevel: Structural loss of share to L1 rivals; close below 1,300 USD.

SOL.thesis: High-beta satellite at $68.18 (+0.55% above $67.81 avgCost, ~1.4% NAV). Small narrative optionality; first position to scale up when sleeve cap rises to 35% on a risk-on regime flip.
SOL.invalidationLevel: Break below 52 USD; network deterioration or sentiment collapse.
